name: sync mechanism appends a structured summary record to pr-corpus/sync-log.jsonl per run
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro pr-corpus && printf 'sources: []\noperator_namespace: []\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/sync-from-sources.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml --log pr-corpus/sync-log.jsonl --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '"started_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z"' pr-corpus/sync-log.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
